reasoning: Bitcoin is hovering between $100k and $103k in early November 2025 after consistently declining from an October peak of ~$125k. With 52 days left in the year, the price needs to drop an additional 10-13% to dip to $90,000. Using standard options pricing models and the probability of a one-touch barrier option, an asset with 50-60% annualized volatility sitting ~10-12% above a barrier with nearly two months remaining has approximately a 50-55% chance of hitting that barrier. While $100,000 serves as a strong psychological support layer, a break below it could trigger cascading liquidations down to $90,000. I estimate the probability at 52%.
